title: evolvulus lithospermoides var. martii
intro: Evolvulus lithospermoides var. martii, also known as the Brazilian dwarf morning glory or Martius' evolvulus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Evolvulus lithospermoides var. martii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Evolvulus lithospermoides var. martii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically in the form of creams and ointments to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
